Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Due To The Statute Of Limitations; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Eduardo Montez
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT EDUARDO MONTEZ's Motion To Dismiss Due To The Statute Of Limitations.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Grant as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.
